username.description: SendOwl API key, sent as the HTTP Basic username.

password.description: SendOwl API secret, sent as the HTTP Basic password. Never logged.

base_url.description: SendOwl API base URL. Defaults to https://www.sendowl.com/api/v1, matching legacy's in-code default. Also usable as a base URL override for tests/proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
